meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Overcoming Marketing Gaps as a Freelancer
content.seo_description: Learn to use a SaaS starter kit to bypass marketing hurdles. An intermediate case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your dev workflow.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing marketing perfection. By leveraging a high-quality SaaS starter kit, you decouple product delivery from acquisition anxiety. Use Antigravity to scaffold production-ready architecture and Claude Code to automate implementation. This workflow allows you to ship functional, revenue-ready apps in days, not months, while focusing purely on code quality.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting a codebase, only to realize the silence of the market is deafening. As a freelancer, the 'no marketing skills' trap is a silent killer of profitable projects. You are a builder, not a growth hacker, and every hour spent worrying about user acquisition is an hour lost on billable development.

But what if your development process was the marketing? By adopting a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you transform your workflow from manual labor to an automated assembly line. This guide reveals how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build products that sell themselves because they are built to scale from day one.

steps.title: Architecting the Core Stack
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using a SaaS starter kit that includes Auth, Stripe integration, and database schema out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a full-stack SaaS starter kit using Next.js 14, Supabase, and Tailwind. Include user authentication, subscription management with Stripe, and a clean, modular component library.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure with Antigravity template for SaaS auth and Stripe'

steps.title: Automating Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to rapidly build out the core functionality of your application based on your initial requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, ensuring row-level security policies are properly configured for Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create Supabase migration files for users, subscriptions, and project entities'

steps.title: Integrating Payment Gateways
steps.description: Streamline the checkout flow to ensure that monetization is baked into the architecture, not bolted on as an afterthought.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler in a Next.js API route that updates subscription status in the Supabase database upon successful payment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement Stripe webhook handler in /app/api/webhooks/stripe'

steps.title: Refining UI/UX for Conversion
steps.description: Ensure the interface is high-converting by utilizing AI to generate professional, clean landing page components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive hero section and pricing table component using Shadcn UI that emphasizes value proposition for B2B users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create landing page components for pricing and feature highlights'

steps.title: Finalizing Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Configure automated testing and deployment to ensure your code is always production-ready and stable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel for the current project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure CI/CD pipeline for Vercel deployment and Vitest integration'

pro_tips: Always prioritize 'marketing-friendly' code by adding metadata tags and open-graph images dynamically in your starter kit.
Use Claude Code to refactor your codebase every 48 hours to eliminate technical debt early.
Treat your SaaS starter kit as a product itself; package it so you can resell your own custom boilerplate to other freelancers.
Inject SEO-friendly server-side rendering (SSR) into your landing pages to ensure search engines index your features without manual effort.
Monitor user behavior using lightweight, privacy-focused analytics integrated directly into your starter kit's middleware.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin a 7-day iteration cycle where you use Claude Code to add one 'growth' feature per day, such as email capture or referral loops.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in isolation and start shipping products that generate recurring revenue. Join a community of elite builders who prioritize speed, automation, and professional-grade architecture. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
